string.text: The achievement of the "cold -blooded killer" has been obtained.
You are a real mercenary.
The mercenary law is the task above all. No feelings, no emotions, no pity. You will kill someone, if it is beneficial to you.
A cold -blooded killer
The achievement of the "friend of the military."
You saved the life of the military.
You acted in good conscience, it costs a lot. The colonel became your friend and promised to pay you - for your help.
Friend of the military
The achievement of "fear is no."
You are really fearless.
If you need to look in fear in your eyes - you can do it with confidence and even prove to everyone that fear does not exist.
There is no fear
The achievement of "patience" has been obtained.
You know how to endure.
If you need to endure or wait, you are quite capable of doing this. Stalkers respect patient people.
Patience
The achievement of the "cowboy" has been obtained.
You are a cool mercenary
Do not scare you. You are used to dominating and solving the issue by force. You are a real mercenary. Stalkers will know about your actions and treats you much more polite.
Cowboy
The achievement of the "diplomat" has been obtained.
You are a real diplomat

You know how to get out of the water dry. In a conversation - you will find a way to avoid unnecessary conflicts. You are very smart and cunning. Scientists immediately see in you the potential for knowledge.
Diplomat
Stalkers have become better for you. \ n in order to somehow thank you somehow, stalkers from time to time leave cartridges in your personal box, in the camp on the "checkpoint".
Good hunters are respected people among stalkers.
A born hunter
Stalkers have become better for you. \ n out of respect for you, stalkers from time to time leave medicines in your personal box, in the camp on the "checkpoint".
Your desire to help others has brought you the respect of stalkers.
Your own among strangers
Now you are a free stalker.
Due to the current situation, you have become outlawed. Now you are the same illegal face as all the inhabiting stalkers in the zone.
Free stalker
The achievement of the "free stalker" has been obtained.
The epilogue has passed.
You have passed the epilogue. Seeing one of the possible endings.
"One in the field of a warrior"
The achievement of "one in the field of the warrior" has been obtained.
The story has begun.
You started a new story. You must find out the whole truth.
В«Rookie in ZoneВ»
The achievement of the вЂњnewborn in the zoneвЂќ was obtained.
